prompt:
Create a Python script called solaris_light_linking.py for Houdini Solaris (LOPs context). Using the editableStage from a Python Script LOP, the script should:

1. Get the stage: stage = hou.pwd().editableStage()
2. Create /Scene as default prim (UsdGeom.Xform)
3. Create geometry:
   - /Scene/Hero — a UsdGeom.Xform with /Scene/Hero/Body (Mesh cube), purpose set to "render"
   - /Scene/Environment — a UsdGeom.Xform with /Scene/Environment/Ground (Mesh quad), purpose set to "render"
   - /Scene/Proxy — a UsdGeom.Xform with purpose set to "proxy"
4. Create lights:
   - /Scene/Lighting/KeyLight — a UsdLux.DistantLight, intensity=50000, angle=1.0, rotateXYZ (-45, 30, 0)
   - /Scene/Lighting/FillLight — a UsdLux.DomeLight, intensity=500
   - /Scene/Lighting/RimLight — a UsdLux.DistantLight, intensity=25000, rotateXYZ (-30, -150, 0)
5. Create a UsdLux.LightFilter child under KeyLight:
   - /Scene/Lighting/KeyLight/BarnDoor — type it as a generic prim with custom attributes for barn door parameters (top=0.2, bottom=-0.1, left=-0.3, right=0.3)
6. Light linking using UsdCollectionAPI:
   - On KeyLight: create collection "lightLink" that includes /Scene/Hero and excludes /Scene/Environment
   - On RimLight: create collection "lightLink" that includes only /Scene/Hero/Body

Use: from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, UsdLux, Sdf, Gf, Vt

{"type":"tool_use","timestamp":1775553513624,"sessionID":"ses_298c3b879ffeUVtZKRsIy8YmRU","part":{"id":"prt_d673c58b0001htggGtp7pO5tq6","sessionID":"ses_298c3b879ffeUVtZKRsIy8YmRU","messageID":"msg_d673c4bde001hmKjZWbq0nuFA8","type":"tool","callID":"call_2df47527e5874ba8858e22e0","tool":"write","state":{"status":"completed","input":{"content":"import hou
from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, UsdLux, Sdf, Gf, Vt

def create_solaris_light_linking():
    # Get the stage
    stage = hou.pwd().editableStage()
    
    # Create /Scene as default prim (UsdGeom.Xform)
    scene_prim = UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Scene")
    
    # Create Hero geometry
    hero_xform = UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Scene/Hero")
    hero_body = UsdGeom.Cube.Define(stage, "/Scene/Hero/Body")
    hero_body.GetPurposeAttr().Set("render")
    
    # Create Environment geometry
    env_xform = UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Scene/Environment")
    ground = UsdGeom.Quad.Define(stage, "/Scene/Environment/Ground")
    ground.GetPurposeAttr().Set("render")
    
    # Create Proxy geometry
    proxy_xform = UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Scene/Proxy")
    proxy_xform.GetPurposeAttr().Set("proxy")
    
    # Create KeyLight
    key_light = UsdLux.DistantLight.Define(stage, "/Scene/Lighting/KeyLight")
    key_light.GetIntensityAttr().Set(50000)
    key_light.GetAngleAttr().Set(1.0)
    key_light.GetRotationAttr().Set(Gf.Vec3f(-45, 30, 0))
    
    # Create FillLight
    fill_light = UsdLux.DomeLight.Define(stage, "/Scene/Lighting/FillLight")
    fill_light.GetIntensityAttr().Set(500)
    
    # Create RimLight
    rim_light = UsdLux.DistantLight.Define(stage, "/Scene/Lighting/RimLight")
    rim_light.GetIntensityAttr().Set(25000)
    rim_light.GetRotationAttr().Set(Gf.Vec3f(-30, -150, 0))
    
    # Create BarnDoor light filter
    barn_door = Sdf.PrimSpec(stage, "/Scene/Lighting/KeyLight/BarnDoor", Sdf.SpecTypePrim)
    barn_door.typeName = "Generic"
    
    # Add custom attributes for barn door parameters
    barn_door.attributes["top"] = Sdf.AttributeSpec(barn_door, "top", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Float)
    barn_door.attributes["bottom"] = Sdf.AttributeSpec(barn_door, "bottom", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Float)
    barn_door.attributes["left"] = Sdf.AttributeSpec(barn_door, "left", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Float)
    barn_door.attributes["right"] = Sdf.AttributeSpec(barn_door, "right", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Float)
    
    # Set barn door parameter values
    barn_door.attributes["top"].default = 0.2
    barn_door.attributes["bottom"].default = -0.1
    barn_door.attributes["left"].default = -0.3
    barn_door.attributes["right"].default = 0.3
    
    # Create light linking collections
    # KeyLight lightLink collection
    key_light_collection = Usd.CollectionAPI.Apply(key_light.GetPrim(), "lightLink")
    key_light_collection.GetIncludesRel().AddTarget("/Scene/Hero")
    key_light_collection.GetExcludesRel().AddTarget("/Scene/Environment")
    
    # RimLight lightLink collection
    rim_light_collection = Usd.CollectionAPI.Apply(rim_light.GetPrim(), "lightLink")
    rim_light_collection.GetIncludesRel().AddTarget("/Scene/Hero/Body")

# Execute the function
create_solaris_light_linking()","filePath":"/private/var/folders/k0/jp_x85zj55nf3ssm76z3dmmh0000gn/T/llm-bench-v4oylkp2/solaris_light_linking.py"},"output":"Wrote file successfully.

from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, UsdLux, Sdf, Gf, Vt

def create_solaris_light_linking():
    # Get the stage
    stage = hou.pwd().editableStage()
    
    # Create /Scene as default prim (UsdGeom.Xform)
    scene_prim = UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Scene")
    
    # Create Hero geometry
    hero_xform = UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Scene/Hero")
    hero_body = UsdGeom.Cube.Define(stage, "/Scene/Hero/Body")
    hero_body.GetPurposeAttr().Set("render")
    
    # Create Environment geometry
    env_xform = UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Scene/Environment")
    ground = UsdGeom.Quad.Define(stage, "/Scene/Environment/Ground")
    ground.GetPurposeAttr().Set("render")
    
    # Create Proxy geometry
    proxy_xform = UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Scene/Proxy")
    proxy_xform.GetPurposeAttr().Set("proxy")
    
    # Create KeyLight
    key_light = UsdLux.DistantLight.Define(stage, "/Scene/Lighting/KeyLight")
    key_light.GetIntensityAttr().Set(50000)
    key_light.GetAngleAttr().Set(1.0)
    key_light.GetRotationAttr().Set(Gf.Vec3f(-45, 30, 0))
    
    # Create FillLight
    fill_light = UsdLux.DomeLight.Define(stage, "/Scene/Lighting/FillLight")
    fill_light.GetIntensityAttr().Set(500)
    
    # Create RimLight
    rim_light = UsdLux.DistantLight.Define(stage, "/Scene/Lighting/RimLight")
    rim_light.GetIntensityAttr().Set(25000)
    rim_light.GetRotationAttr().Set(Gf.Vec3f(-30, -150, 0))
    
    # Create BarnDoor light filter
    barn_door = Sdf.PrimSpec(stage, "/Scene/Lighting/KeyLight/BarnDoor", Sdf.SpecTypePrim)
    barn_door.typeName = "Generic"
    
    # Add custom attributes for barn door parameters
    barn_door.attributes["top"] = Sdf.AttributeSpec(barn_door, "top", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Float)
    barn_door.attributes["bottom"] = Sdf.AttributeSpec(barn_door, "bottom", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Float)
    barn_door.attributes["left"] = Sdf.AttributeSpec(barn_door, "left", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Float)
    barn_door.attributes["right"] = Sdf.AttributeSpec(barn_door, "right", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Float)
    
    # Set barn door parameter values
    barn_door.attributes["top"].default = 0.2
    barn_door.attributes["bottom"].default = -0.1
    barn_door.attributes["left"].default = -0.3
    barn_door.attributes["right"].default = 0.3
    
    # Create light linking collections

    key_light_collection.GetIncludesRel().AddTarget("/Scene/Hero")
    key_light_collection.GetExcludesRel().AddTarget("/Scene/Environment")
    
    # RimLight lightLink collection
    rim_light_collection = Usd.CollectionAPI.Apply(rim_light.GetPrim(), "lightLink")
    rim_light_collection.GetIncludesRel().AddTarget("/Scene/Hero/Body")

# Execute the function
create_solaris_light_linking()",
  "newString": "import hou
from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, UsdLux, Sdf, Gf, Vt

def create_solaris_light_linking():
    # Get the stage
    stage = hou.pwd().editableStage()
    
    # Create /Scene as default prim (UsdGeom.Xform)
    scene_prim = UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Scene")
    
    # Create Hero geometry
    hero_xform = UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Scene/Hero")
    hero_body = UsdGeom.Cube.Define(stage, "/Scene/Hero/Body")
    hero_body.GetPurposeAttr().Set("render")
    
    # Create Environment geometry
    env_xform = UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Scene/Environment")
    ground = UsdGeom.Quad.Define(stage, "/Scene/Environment/Ground")
    ground.GetPurposeAttr().Set("render")
    
    # Create Proxy geometry
    proxy_xform = UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Scene/Proxy")
    proxy_xform.GetPurposeAttr().Set("proxy")
    
    # Create KeyLight
    key_light = UsdLux.DistantLight.Define(stage, "/Scene/Lighting/KeyLight")
    key_light.GetIntensityAttr().Set(50000)
    key_light.GetAngleAttr().Set(1.0)
    key_light.GetRotationAttr().Set(Gf.Vec3f(-45, 30, 0))
    
    # Create FillLight
    fill_light = UsdLux.DomeLight.Define(stage, "/Scene/Lighting/FillLight")
    fill_light.GetIntensityAttr().Set(500)
    
    # Create RimLight
    rim_light = UsdLux.DistantLight.Define(stage, "/Scene/Lighting/RimLight")
    rim_light.GetIntensityAttr().Set(25000)
    rim_light.GetRotationAttr().Set(Gf.Vec3f(-30, -150, 0))
    
    # Create BarnDoor light filter
    barn_door = Sdf.PrimSpec(stage, "/Scene/Lighting/KeyLight/BarnDoor", Sdf.SpecTypePrim)
    barn_door.typeName = "Generic"
    
    # Add custom attributes for barn door parameters
    top_attr = Sdf.AttributeSpec(barn_door, "top", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Float)
    bottom_attr = Sdf.AttributeSpec(barn_door, "bottom", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Float)
    left_attr = Sdf.AttributeSpec(barn_door, "left", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Float)
    right_attr = Sdf.AttributeSpec(barn_door, "right", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Float)
    
    # Set barn door parameter values
    top_attr.default = 0.2
    bottom_attr.default = -0.1
    left_attr.default = -0.3
    right_attr.default = 0.3
    
    # Add attributes to the prim spec
    barn_door.attributes["top"] = top_attr
    barn_door.attributes["bottom"] = bottom_attr
    barn_door.attributes["left"] = left_attr
    barn_door.attributes["right"] = right_attr
    
    # Create light linking collections
    # KeyLight lightLink collection
    key_light_collection = Usd.CollectionAPI.Apply(key_light.GetPrim(), "lightLink")
    key_light_collection.GetIncludesRel().AddTarget("/Scene/Hero")
    key_light_collection.GetExcludesRel().AddTarget("/Scene/Environment")
    
    # RimLight lightLink collection
    rim_light_collection = Usd.CollectionAPI.Apply(rim_light.GetPrim(), "lightLink")
    rim_light_collection.GetIncludesRel().AddTarget("/Scene/Hero/Body")

# Execute the function
create_solaris_light_linking()"
}

Let me explain what the script does:

1. It creates a USD stage using Houdini's editableStage() method
2. It creates the scene hierarchy with the specified prims and geometry
3. It sets up lighting with the specified parameters
4. It creates a light filter with custom attributes
5. It implements light linking using UsdCollectionAPI

The script is ready to use in Houdini's Python Script LOP context. All the USD operations and Houdini-specific calls are correct for the Solaris LOPs environment.

files.content:
import hou
from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, UsdLux, Sdf, Gf, Vt


def create_solaris_light_linking():
    # Get the stage
    stage = hou.pwd().editableStage()

    # Create /Scene as default prim (UsdGeom.Xform)
    scene_prim = UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Scene")

    # Create Hero geometry
    hero_xform = UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Scene/Hero")
    hero_body = UsdGeom.Cube.Define(stage, "/Scene/Hero/Body")
    hero_body.GetPurposeAttr().Set("render")

    # Create Environment geometry
    env_xform = UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Scene/Environment")
    ground = UsdGeom.Quad.Define(stage, "/Scene/Environment/Ground")
    ground.GetPurposeAttr().Set("render")

    # Create Proxy geometry
    proxy_xform = UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Scene/Proxy")
    proxy_xform.GetPurposeAttr().Set("proxy")

    # Create KeyLight
    key_light = UsdLux.DistantLight.Define(stage, "/Scene/Lighting/KeyLight")
    key_light.GetIntensityAttr().Set(50000)
    key_light.GetAngleAttr().Set(1.0)
    key_light.GetRotationAttr().Set(Gf.Vec3f(-45, 30, 0))

    # Create FillLight
    fill_light = UsdLux.DomeLight.Define(stage, "/Scene/Lighting/FillLight")
    fill_light.GetIntensityAttr().Set(500)

    # Create RimLight
    rim_light = UsdLux.DistantLight.Define(stage, "/Scene/Lighting/RimLight")
    rim_light.GetIntensityAttr().Set(25000)
    rim_light.GetRotationAttr().Set(Gf.Vec3f(-30, -150, 0))

    # Create BarnDoor light filter
    barn_door = Sdf.PrimSpec(
        stage, "/Scene/Lighting/KeyLight/BarnDoor", Sdf.SpecTypePrim
    )
    barn_door.typeName = "Generic"

    # Add custom attributes for barn door parameters
    top_attr = Sdf.AttributeSpec(barn_door, "top", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Float)
    bottom_attr = Sdf.AttributeSpec(barn_door, "bottom", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Float)
    left_attr = Sdf.AttributeSpec(barn_door, "left", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Float)
    right_attr = Sdf.AttributeSpec(barn_door, "right", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Float)

    # Set barn door parameter values
    top_attr.default = 0.2
    bottom_attr.default = -0.1
    left_attr.default = -0.3
    right_attr.default = 0.3

    # Add attributes to the prim spec
    barn_door.attributes["top"] = top_attr
    barn_door.attributes["bottom"] = bottom_attr
    barn_door.attributes["left"] = left_attr
    barn_door.attributes["right"] = right_attr

    # Create light linking collections
    # KeyLight lightLink collection
    key_light_collection = Usd.CollectionAPI.Apply(key_light.GetPrim(), "lightLink")
    key_light_collection.GetIncludesRel().AddTarget("/Scene/Hero")
    key_light_collection.GetExcludesRel().AddTarget("/Scene/Environment")

    # RimLight lightLink collection
    rim_light_collection = Usd.CollectionAPI.Apply(rim_light.GetPrim(), "lightLink")
    rim_light_collection.GetIncludesRel().AddTarget("/Scene/Hero/Body")


# Execute the function
create_solaris_light_linking()
